title: Create LAN-based website for local network

requirements.text: Create a landing page that displays a welcome message confirming the site is running on the local network
Implement a simple navigation menu with sections for common LAN website features: Dashboard, Network Status, and Settings
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation menu is visible on all pages
All three menu items are present and clickable
Navigation provides clear indication of current page

requirements.text: Create a Dashboard page that displays basic network information placeholder sections
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard page is accessible from navigation
Page displays placeholder sections for network info

requirements.text: Add a creative, professional visual theme with a modern color scheme (avoid blue and purple) that conveys reliability and local network connectivity, with consistent typography and spacing throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent color scheme applied across all pages
Design does not use blue or purple as primary colors

constraints: Website must be accessible on local network without external dependencies
Use only supported technologies: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Motoko backend
nonGoals: Integration with actual network devices or routers

required: Network connectivity icon with geometric lines and nodes representing local network (network-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Hero banner background with abstract network pattern in earthy tones (hero-network.dim_1920x400.png)
